name: Chicken Fried Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the minute steaks between pieces of wax paper. Pound to 1/4 inch thick using the flat side of a wooden mallet.
2. Beat the egg and dip each steak one at a time into it.
3. Mix the bread crumbs, salt, and pepper.
4. Dip the steaks into the breadcrumb mixture.
5. Heat the oil in a heavy skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Brown the steaks for 8 to 10 minutes per side.
7. Place the steaks on a warm platter. Keep hot.
8. Stir the flour into the pan drippings and cook until lightly browned.
9. Using a whisk, stir in the milk and cook until it thickens to gravy. Add water if needed to thin.
10. Add salt and pepper to taste. Return the steaks to the pan and simmer until ready to serve.
11. Garnish with parsley and a side of sliced tomatoes.
